---
title: "Sharing Templates"
description: "Learn how to share your templates on CodeRocket"
icon: "tags"
---

Learn how to list and share your AI-generated templates on CodeRocket.

## Prerequisites

Before you can share templates, you need:

<Steps>
  <Step title="High-Quality Work">
    Ensure your templates are well-designed, functional, and original
  </Step>
  <Step title="Free Templates">
    Anyone can share free templates - no subscription required
  </Step>
  <Step title="Premium Templates">
    Premium templates require active CodeRocket Premium subscription and Stripe Connect account
  </Step>
</Steps>

## Creating a Template Listing

### 1. Access the Template Form

From your account:
- Go to **My Listed Templates** in the sidebar
- Click **Add Template**
- Or from the main Templates page, click **Add Template**

### 2. Select Your Component

Choose from your components:
- Select the specific version you want to share
- Preview will be generated from your component

### 3. Set Up Your Template

Fill out the template details:

<AccordionGroup>
  <Accordion title="Basic Information">
    - **Title**: Clear, descriptive name for your template
    - **Description**: Detailed explanation of what the template does
    - **Category**: Choose the most appropriate category
  </Accordion>

  <Accordion title="Pricing">
    - **Free Template**: Set price to $0 for community sharing
    - **Premium Template**: Set your price in USD (minimum $1.00)
    - Remember: you receive 70% after platform commission (premium only)
    - Consider the complexity and value of your template
  </Accordion>

  <Accordion title="Preview & Demo">
    - **Preview Image**: Automatically generated from your template
    - **Demo URL**: Optional link to live demo
    - High-quality previews increase usage
  </Accordion>
</AccordionGroup>

### 4. Publish Your Template

- Review all information carefully
- Click **Create Template** to publish
- Your template becomes available immediately

## Managing Your Templates

### View Performance
Track your templates from **My Listed Templates**:
- **Total Uses**: Number of times used
- **Earnings**: Your share after commission (premium templates)
- **Views**: Template visibility metrics

### Edit Templates
You can update:
- Title and description
- Price (affects future usage only)
- Preview image
- Demo URL

### Deactivate Templates
- Toggle templates active/inactive
- Inactive templates don't appear in templates
- You can reactivate anytime

## Pricing Strategy

### Free Templates
- **Community Sharing**: Share your work with the community
- **No Revenue**: No earnings from free templates
- **Wide Reach**: More likely to be used and shared
- **Portfolio Building**: Showcase your skills

### Premium Templates
- **Simple Templates**: $5-15
- **Complex Templates**: $15-50
- **Full Templates**: $25-100+
- **Premium/Unique**: $50-200+

### Factors to Consider
- **Complexity**: More complex = higher price
- **Uniqueness**: Rare designs command premium
- **Quality**: Professional polish increases value
- **Market**: Research similar templates

## Best Practices

<CardGroup cols={2}>
  <Card title="Quality First" icon="star">
    Create polished, professional templates that solve real problems
  </Card>
  <Card title="Clear Descriptions" icon="file-text">
    Write detailed descriptions explaining features and use cases
  </Card>
  <Card title="Good Previews" icon="image">
    Ensure your template preview clearly shows the design
  </Card>
  <Card title="Competitive Pricing" icon="dollar-sign">
    Research similar templates to price competitively
  </Card>
</CardGroup>

## Earnings & Payouts

### Commission Structure (Premium Templates)
- **Your Share**: 70% of sale price
- **Platform Fee**: 30% for processing, hosting, support

### Payment Processing (Premium Templates)
- Payments processed via Stripe
- Earnings tracked in real-time
- Monthly payout statements available

### Tax Considerations
<Warning>
  You're responsible for tax obligations on template earnings. Consult a tax professional for guidance.
</Warning>

## Common Issues

<AccordionGroup>
  <Accordion title="Template Not Showing in Dropdown">
    - Ensure component is properly created
    - Check you have the right permissions
    - Template must be yours (not forked)
  </Accordion>

  <Accordion title="Low Usage">
    - Improve preview image quality
    - Update description with more details
    - Consider adjusting price (premium templates)
    - Add demo URL if possible
  </Accordion>

  <Accordion title="Preview Not Generating">
    - Template may have rendering issues
    - Check template works properly
    - Contact support if issues persist
  </Accordion>
</AccordionGroup>

## Support

Need help with sharing? Here are your options:

- **Community**: Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/t7dQgcYJ5t) for creator tips
- **Documentation**: Check our [GitHub Integration](/github/overview) guide
- **Support**: Contact us through the app for technical issues

Ready to start sharing? Head to your [My Listed Templates](https://coderocket.app/account/templates/listings) page and create your first template!
